name: Weapons Apprentice
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears blacksmith's pants and a blacksmith's apron along with heavy boots and gauntlets. Carries a repair hammer like all blacksmiths.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: hostile, competitive, accusatory
Role: The Weapons Apprentice is one of two apprentices working under the Drothmeri Army's Forgemaster at Sundercliff Forge. The other apprentice handles armor production. The Drothmeri Army is made up of Dunmer mercenaries, criminals, and rebels serving the rogue Telvanni Arch-Mage Frathen Drothan.
Home Location Information: Sundercliff Forge at Sundercliff Watch.
Daily Routine: The Weapons Apprentice stands by his forge at all times, working on weapon production.
Rivalry with the Armor Apprentice: There is a rivalry between the two apprentices. One of them has sent the Forgemaster a note accusing the other of skulduggery.
Personality - The Competitive Apprentice: The Weapons Apprentice's rivalry with his fellow apprentice has led to accusations of wrongdoing between them.
author: Bethesda
